GpuProjectExec: expr=[brand_id@0 as brand_id, brand@1 as brand, i_manufact_id@2 as i_manufact_id, i_manufact@3 as i_manufact, ext_price@4 as ext_price]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand@5 ASC NULLS LAST, i_brand_id@6 ASC NULLS LAST, i_manufact_id@2 ASC NULLS LAST, i_manufact@3 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand@5 ASC NULLS LAST, i_brand_id@6 ASC NULLS LAST, i_manufact_id@2 ASC NULLS LAST, i_manufact@3 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_brand_id@1 as brand_id, i_brand@0 as brand, i_manufact_id@2 as i_manufact_id, i_manufact@3 as i_manufact, sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@4 as ext_price, i_brand@0 as i_brand, i_brand_id@1 as i_brand_id]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, i_manufact_id, i_manufact], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_brand@0, i_brand_id@1, i_manufact_id@2, i_manufact@3], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, i_manufact_id, i_manufact], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_store_sk@0, ss_store_sk@0)], filter=substr(ca_zip@0, 1, 5) != substr(s_zip@1, 1, 5), projection=[3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1
                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=8388608
